Keyword Search defaults to direct whole-: Keyword Search defaults to direct whole-query matching across entry titles, groups, keywords, content, UID, and automation ID.
Default Keyword Search looks for the exa: Default Keyword Search looks for the exact text dragon queen.
With Advanced syntax off, this searches: With Advanced syntax off, this searches the literal text uid:42.

title: searches entry titles, memo/comme: title: searches entry titles, memo/comment, and primary/secondary keywords. group:, uid:, and automationId: search only those fields. content: searches entry content only.
With Advanced syntax enabled, space-sepa: With Advanced syntax enabled, space-separated terms use AND. Both terms must match.
Scope a term to group, UID, or automatio: Scope a term to group, UID, or automation ID.
Aliases: name:, comment:, key:, and keyw: Aliases: name:, comment:, key:, and keywords: map to title:. text: and body: map to content:. id: maps to uid:, while automation_id: and autoid: map to automationId:.
Keyword syntax works in editor Keyword S: Keyword syntax works in editor Keyword Search mode and in the lorebook manager's Search entries/content mode.
Quoted phrases, -, OR, |, title:, and co: Quoted phrases, -, OR, |, title:, and content: only work in Keyword Search mode. Fuzzy Match treats the input as plain fuzzy text.
title: searches entry titles, memo/comme: title: searches entry titles, memo/comment, and primary/secondary keywords. content: searches entry content only.
Space-separated terms use AND. Both term: Space-separated terms use AND. Both terms must match.
Quoted text matches an exact phrase.
Prefix a term with - to exclude matches.
Scope a term to title/keywords or conten: Scope a term to title/keywords or content.
You can combine scope prefixes with OR c: You can combine scope prefixes with OR clauses.
Aliases: name: and comment: map to title: Aliases: name: and comment: map to title:, while text: and body: map to content:.

Direct keyword match across entry titles: Direct keyword match across entry titles, groups, keys, content, UID, and automation ID in all lorebooks.
Advanced keyword search across all loreb: Advanced keyword search across all lorebooks. Supports title:, group:, uid:, automationId:, content:, quotes, -, and OR.
